= string

Converts a value to a string representation

== Examples

[,bloblang]
----
root.nested_json = this.string()

# In:  {"foo":"bar"}
# Out: {"nested_json":"{\"foo\":\"bar\"}"}
----

[,bloblang]
----
root.id = this.id.string()

# In:  {"id":228930314431312345}
# Out: {"id":"228930314431312345"}
----
